title: Subitem Name Field added as option to notify in Slack/etc

Description
I request the subitem name field be added to the list of options that can be notified. Currently only the item name can be notified when a subitem column is updated.

posts.author: KarelR (Karel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I request the subitem name field be added to the list of options that can be notified. Currently only the item name can be notified when a subitem column is updated.

What are you trying to achieve

Notify subitem name in Slack when Status field is updated to Done
